mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vaccine_record (pet_id, vaccine_name, vaccination_date, next_due_date, status) VALUES (#{petId}, #{vaccineName}, #{vaccinationDate}, #{nextDueDate}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, pet_id, vaccine_name, vaccination_date, next_due_date, status, create_time FROM vaccine_record WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, pet_id, vaccine_name, vaccination_date, next_due_date, status, create_time FROM vaccine_record WHERE pet_id = #{petId} ORDER BY vaccination_date DESC

SELECT vr.id, vr.pet_id, vr.vaccine_name, vr.vaccination_date, vr.next_due_date, vr.status, vr.create_time, pet.name AS pet_name FROM vaccine_record vr LEFT JOIN pet ON vr.pet_id = pet.id LEFT JOIN user u ON pet.user_id = u.id WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND vr.status = 0 AND vr.next_due_date BETWEEN CURDATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) ORDER BY vr.next_due_date ASC

SELECT vr.id, vr.pet_id, vr.vaccine_name, vr.vaccination_date, vr.next_due_date, vr.status, vr.create_time, pet.name AS pet_name FROM vaccine_record vr LEFT JOIN pet ON vr.pet_id = pet.id LEFT JOIN user u ON pet.user_id = u.id WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND vr.status = 0 AND vr.next_due_date < CURDATE() ORDER BY vr.next_due_date ASC

SELECT vr.id, vr.pet_id, vr.vaccine_name, vr.vaccination_date, vr.next_due_date, vr.status, vr.create_time, pet.name AS pet_name FROM vaccine_record vr LEFT JOIN pet ON vr.pet_id = pet.id ORDER BY vr.create_time DESC
